subcodes.first_line: The remembrance from Us is unto him who hath cast away vain imaginings and taken fast hold of that which hath been illumined by the light of certitude, that the breeze of God may pass over him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا الی من نبذ الاوهام و اخذ من لاح به نور الیقین لتمر علیه نسمه الله
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @Word of God and human limitations, @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
